---
title: "Analyse von Maximalpegeln kommunaler Messtationen"
author: "Matthias Lochmann, HLNUG"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: word_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(tidyverse)
```

## Daten

Die Daten wurden am 22.1.2026 bereitgestellt von Horst Weise, DFLD.

```{r}
data_first <- read_delim(
  "data/20240801-074.csv",
  delim = ";",
  escape_double = FALSE,
  col_names = c("zeit", "pegelRoh"),
  col_types = list(zeit = col_time(format = "%H:%M:%S"), pegelRoh = 'i'),
  trim_ws = TRUE
)
```
